service.name: Airbnb API
service.description_for_ai: Vacation rental and short-term accommodation platform. 7M+ listings in 220+ countries. Unique stays: houses, apartments, villas, treehouses. Official API very restricted — primarily for property managers and analytics partners.
service.access_note: ⚠️ Very restricted API. Primarily for property management systems. Most features require partnership agreement.

auth.how_to_get: Apply at https://www.airbnb.com/partner — requires business justification

capabilities.description_for_ai: Vacation rental and short-term accommodation platform. 7M+ listings in 220+ countries. Unique stays: houses, apartments, villas, treehouses. Official API very restricted — primarily for property managers and analytics partners. Get listing details: description, photos, price, availability, reviews, host info.

agent_hints.alternative: For public Airbnb data consider RapidAPI scrapers or AirDNA for analytics. Official API is very restricted.
